query: we're onboarding a new client, Brightwave Academy, and they want their own look — a deep purple brand colour and more rounded corners everywhere. how do i set that up without forking the whole codebase?
i need to add a drop-shadow scale to the design system (like an sm/md/lg elevation), on-brand. where do these tokens go and how do i make them actually show up as tailwind classes?
badges and buttons both pull from the primary colour so i can't make the badge corners square without changing the buttons too. can you make them independently themeable?
i added --surface-raised to the css but bg-surface-raised does nothing in my component, the class just isn't generated. what did i miss?
quick one — when i add a spacing value that two or three components will share, does it belong in primitives.css, semantic.css, or the component file? want it in the right tier
a client emailed us their theme override file (theme-northwind.css). can you check it's valid and not reaching into anything internal before we let them upload it?
our card's inner padding is hardcoded inline right now. marketing wants to tighten it per-brand — make it configurable through the theme layer
can you sweep packages/ui/src/styles and confirm the token tiers are still consistent? i've been hacking and i think i pointed a component token straight at a raw palette colour somewhere
i want to rename --btn-bg to match our naming convention and move its light/dark split into the right layer — right now it's all jammed into one block
set up a z-index scale so the modal, dropdown and toast stop fighting each other over stacking order
the muted helper text under our form fields is too light to read — bump it darker. these are school users so it has to clear AA
turn #1d9bf0 (that twitter blue) into one of our oklch colours
add a tooltip component to the design system, we don't have one yet
i found a nice Radix-based combobox online, convert it to our Base UI setup and drop it in packages/ui
is our current palette actually accessible? audit the contrast ratios across light and dark and tell me what fails
the destructive red is hard to read sitting on the toast background — what value should i switch it to?
there's a flexbox bug in the card footer, the action button overflows its container on mobile widths
bump tailwind from 4.0 to the latest 4.x patch and make sure the build still works
add a little light/dark toggle button to the navbar so users can flip the theme themselves
what colour should the new 'pending' status badge be? something that reads as in-progress but isn't our warning amber
